faq.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Addressing common concerns before we start.
faq.a1: Most projects are completed within 3 to 7 working days, depending on scope and content readiness. Urgent projects can be prioritized upon request.
faq.a2: Yes. We can handle basic copywriting, layout structure, and visual direction. However, for best results, we recommend providing your product details, brand assets, and key messaging.
faq.q3: Will my website be optimized for conversions?
faq.a3: Absolutely. Every page is designed with a conversion first approach, including strategic layout, call to actions, and user flow to maximize leads and sales.
faq.a4: Yes, we implement basic on page SEO such as proper structure, meta tags, and performance optimization. Advanced SEO services can be added separately.
faq.a5: Yes. We provide revision rounds to ensure the final design meets your expectations and business goals.
faq.q6: Will my website be mobile friendly?
faq.a6: 100%. Your website will be fully responsive, optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.
faq.q7: Can I upgrade or scale my website later?
faq.a7: Yes. Your website is built with scalability in mind, allowing future upgrades such as additional pages, features, or integrations.
faq.q8: Do you provide domain and hosting?
faq.a8: We can guide you through the setup or manage it for you. Domain and hosting are charged separately unless included in your package.
faq.a9: We primarily build using WordPress + Elementor, ensuring flexibility, ease of management, and long term scalability.
faq.q10: Will I be able to edit the website myself?
faq.a10: Yes. You’ll have full access and can easily update content using a user friendly editor without technical skills.
faq.q11: Do you integrate payment systems or forms?
faq.a11: Yes. We can integrate payment gateways, lead forms, WhatsApp buttons, and automation tools based on your needs.
faq.q12: What if I don’t have any technical knowledge?
faq.a12: No problem. We handle everything from setup to launch. You just focus on your business, we take care of the rest.

who.headline: This Service Is Ideal For:
who.a1Desc: or services that people are actively searching for on Google.
who.a2Desc: that need faster, measurable leads and sales growth.

problem.probHeadline:
Google Ads Works
When It’s Done Right
problem.p1: Spending money but getting low-quality clicks
problem.p2: Ads showing for irrelevant search terms
problem.p3: No clear tracking of leads or sales
problem.solDesc: Google Ads connects your business with customers at the exact moment they are searching. We ensure your ads appear for the right keywords, with the right message, and are continuously optimized for performance.

what.headline: What’s Included
what.subtitle: Comprehensive management from setup to scaling.
what.i1: Keyword research based on buying intent

process.label: How We Work
process.headline: Our Google Ads Management Process
process.p1Desc: Understand your offer, audience, and buying intent.
process.p2Desc: Build a clean, conversion-focused campaign structure.
process.p4Desc: Scale what works and eliminate wasted spend.

faq.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Addressing common concerns before we start.
faq.q1: How long does it take to see results?
faq.a1: Google Ads can start generating traffic almost immediately after launch. However, meaningful and optimized results typically appear within 2 to 4 weeks as we gather data and refine the campaigns.
faq.q2: How much budget do I need to start?
faq.a2: The ideal budget depends on your industry and competition. Most clients start from RM 30 to RM 100/day, but we’ll recommend a strategy based on your goals and market demand.
faq.a3: We don’t believe in unrealistic guarantees. What we do guarantee is a data driven strategy, continuous optimization, and full transparency to maximize your ROI.
faq.q4: What’s included in your Google Ads management service?
faq.a4: Our service includes: Campaign setup and structure, Keyword research (high intent focus), Ad copywriting, Conversion tracking setup, Ongoing optimization and scaling.
faq.q5: Will I have access to my Google Ads account?
faq.a5: Yes. You will have full ownership and access to your account at all times. We operate with complete transparency.
faq.q6: How do you ensure my ads attract quality buyers?
faq.a6: We focus on high intent keywords, precise targeting, and optimized ad messaging to reach users who are actively searching and ready to take action.
faq.q7: Do you handle landing pages as well?
faq.a7: Yes. We can design or optimize high converting landing pages to ensure your ad traffic turns into actual leads or sales.
faq.q8: What if my ads are not performing well?
faq.a8: We continuously monitor performance and make data driven adjustments, including keywords, bidding, targeting, and creatives, to improve results.
faq.q9: Can I stop or pause anytime?
faq.a9: Yes. There are no long term lock ins. You have full control to pause, scale, or stop campaigns anytime.
faq.a10: We track key metrics such as: Cost per lead (CPL), Conversion rate, Return on ad spend (ROAS), Revenue generated. Everything is clearly reported so you know exactly where your money goes.

cta.headline:
Ready to Attract Customers
Who Are Already Searching?
cta.subtitle: Let’s review your business goals and see if Google Ads is the right growth channel for you.
cta.footer: Clear strategy. Transparent pricing. No long-term lock-in.

who.a1Desc: that want to generate consistent leads or sales.
who.a2Desc: businesses launching new products or offers to the market.

who.a4Desc: businesses ready to scale with paid social traffic.

problem.probHeadline:
Facebook Ads Work —
When Strategy Meets Creative
problem.p1: Ads get clicks but no conversions
problem.p4: No clear funnel or follow-up strategy
problem.solDesc: Facebook and Instagram Ads allow you to reach your ideal customers based on interests, behavior, and intent. We combine audience strategy, compelling creatives, and continuous optimization to turn attention into measurable results.

what.headline: What’s Included
what.subtitle: Full-service management for your social ad growth.
what.i2: Campaign and ad set structure setup

process.label: How We Work
process.headline: Our Meta Ads Management Process
process.p1Desc: Understand your offer, audience, and objective.
process.p2Desc: Build structured campaigns with proper targeting.
process.p3Desc: Test, analyze, and refine ads continuously.
process.p4Desc: Increase budget on winning ads and audiences.

faq.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Addressing common concerns before we start.
faq.q1: How long does it take to see results?
faq.a1: Meta Ads can generate traffic quickly, often within 24 to 72 hours after launch. However, optimal performance usually takes 2 to 3 weeks as we test creatives, audiences, and optimize campaigns.
faq.q2: How much budget do I need to start?
faq.a2: We typically recommend starting from RM 30 to RM 150 per day, depending on your niche and goals. A proper testing budget is important to identify winning creatives and audiences.
faq.q3: Do you create the ad creatives as well?
faq.a3: Yes. We help with creative direction, messaging, and ad structure. If needed, we can also assist with content ideas tailored for high engagement and conversions.
faq.q4: What makes Meta Ads different from Google Ads?
faq.a4: Meta Ads focus on capturing attention and creating demand, while Google Ads target users who are already searching. With the right strategy, Meta Ads can scale your brand faster.
faq.a5: No agency can guarantee sales, but we focus on what matters: 👉 data driven testing, strong creatives, and continuous optimization to maximize your return.
faq.q6: How do you ensure my ads perform well?
faq.a6: We focus on: Scroll stopping creatives, Clear messaging and hooks, Audience testing (broad + targeted), Continuous A/B testing. Everything is optimized based on real performance data.
faq.q7: What if my ads are not performing?
faq.a7: We continuously monitor campaigns and adjust: Creatives, Targeting, Budget allocation. If something doesn’t work, we pivot fast to find what does.
faq.q8: Will I have access to my ad account?
faq.a8: Yes. You will have full access and ownership of your Meta Ads account at all times.
faq.q9: Do you handle landing pages as well?
faq.a9: Yes. We can design or optimize high converting landing pages to ensure your ad traffic turns into actual leads or sales.
faq.q10: Can I scale my ads once they are profitable?
faq.a10: Yes. Once we identify winning campaigns, we scale using proven strategies while maintaining performance and cost efficiency.
faq.q11: Is this suitable for new businesses?
faq.a11: Yes. Meta Ads are ideal for businesses that want to: Generate awareness quickly, Test product market fit, Start getting sales even without organic traffic.

cta.headline:
Ready to Turn Social Media
Attention Into Revenue?
cta.subtitle: Let’s review your business goals and see if Meta Ads are the right growth channel for you.
